data.name: AV導演生活！
data.detailed_description:
親手製作AV！AV製作模擬遊戲！ 

本作是一款可以讓您自由享受AV拍攝、剪輯和販售的模擬遊戲。以還清債務為目標的主角，將與女主角「和」一同展開多采多姿的劇情和場景！

開拓拍攝地點，活用各種道具，製作出最棒的AV作品吧！

拍攝、剪輯、銷售！體驗作為導演的一切

將充滿魅力的「和」順從慾望和本能拍攝完畢後，就進入剪輯階段。

您可以像實際剪輯影片一樣，體驗對各場景進行剪下和修剪。

此外，還可以設定標題、類型、價格等，將作品昇華為一部充滿感官刺激的傑作！

開始銷售後，您會收到用戶的評價，而作品的銷量會根據評價大幅變動。

為了獲得更高的評價，您必須在攝影技巧、構圖等方面下功夫。

磨練您作為導演的技巧，目標直指排行榜第1名！

還清債務與作為導演的成功，力爭達成雙重目標！

孝介面臨著每5天必須償還一次債務的考驗。

他一邊在鎮上打工賺取日常開銷，一邊繼續製作活動來籌集資金。

在作品製作和資金管理之間取得平衡，是成功的關鍵。

克服償還債務的重壓，透過AV製作擴大事業，

向著導演的巔峰邁進吧！

由主要女主角和三位次要女主角交織出的戲劇性故事

本故事的中心人物，是曾在AV業界工作的主角安田孝介和女主角和。

兩人從商業夥伴開始的關係，最終發展成一段特殊的羈絆。

此外，還有三位次要女主角登場：前同事舞子、道具店店主蕾夢以及和的摯友優奈。

與這些充滿個性的她們的交流，為AV製作增添了更多的刺激與深度！

 
 

 
 角色介紹

【姫宮 和】

本作的女主角。

有一個從兒時就認識、同年紀的男朋友。

因某個原因背負了鉅額債務，

在為此煩惱時，與孝介相遇。

【秋月 舞子】

孝介曾就職公司的前同事。

對孝介懷有祕密的情感。

一次偶然的機會與他重逢，

並開始就AV製作提供建議。

【蕾夢】

在鎮上經營著一家可疑道具店的大姐姐。

年齡不詳。

她為孝介等人提供各種器材，

並銷售可用於拍攝的物品。

據說她有丈夫，並獨自一人賺錢養家。

【優奈】

和的摯友，一個辣妹型的女孩。

雖然擔心和的工作，

但由於和本人不願透露，

感到很苦惱。

【安田 孝介】

本作的主角。一個喜歡酒、女人和賭博的廢柴。

被AV製作公司開除後，過著沉迷於賭博的日子，

但當他發現和時，覺得這是個賺錢的機會，於是決定成立一家AV公司。

 
 【中山蒼也】

和的男朋友，也是她的兒時玩伴。

雖然他從小就非常了解和，

但和並沒有告訴他關於債務的事情。

遊戲內容

  • 17個關卡

  • 4位女主角

  • 34種情境

  • 18個事件場景

  • 超過800個動畫

  • 超過20分鐘的影片

  • 超過35張CG

  • 5套額外服裝

  • 總文本量超過25萬字

  • 總語音收錄時長超過26小時

  • 4種小遊戲

  • 遊戲時長：10-20小時

  • 超過110種道具

  • 支援語言：日語、英語、簡體中文、繁體中文、西班牙語、韓語

data.short_description: 一款可以自由拍攝、剪輯和銷售的成人影片製作模擬遊戲！與充滿魅力的女主角們一同製作最棒的作品，提升評價並增加銷量。在努力還清債務的同時，作為導演挑戰業界的巔峰，熱血的旅程即將展開！
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 7th gen
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: AV Director Life!
data.detailed_description:
Produce JAVs with your own hands! A JAV Production Simulation Game!

This is a simulation game where you can freely enjoy shooting, editing, and selling AVs. The protagonist, who is trying to pay off his debts, works with the main heroine, Nodoka, to develop a variety of scenes and situations!

Explore new shooting locations and use items to create the best JAV possible!

Shooting, Editing, Selling! The Full Director Experience

After filming the charming Nodoka according to your desires and instincts, it's on to the editing phase.

You can experience cutting and trimming each scene just like real video editing.

You can also set the title, genre, and price to elevate your work into a sensual masterpiece!

Once you start selling, you'll receive ratings from users, and these ratings will greatly affect your sales.

To get higher ratings, you'll need to be creative with your camerawork, composition, and more.

Hone your skills as a director and aim for the #1 spot in the rankings!

Pay Off Debt and Succeed as a Director - Achieve Two Goals at Once!

Kosuke faces the ordeal of making debt repayments every 5 days.

He earns daily cash by working part-time jobs in town while continuing his production activities to raise funds.

The balance between film production and financial management is the key to success.

Overcome the pressure of debt repayment, expand your business with JAV production,

and aim for the top as a director!

A Dramatic Story Woven by the Main Heroine and Three Sub-Heroines

The central characters of this story are the protagonist, Kosuke Yasuda, who used to be in the JAV industry, and the heroine, Nodoka.

Their relationship begins as business partners but eventually develops into a special bond.

In addition, three sub-heroines make an appearance: Maiko, a former colleague; Rem, the owner of an item shop; and Yuna, Nodoka's best friend.

Interacting with these unique girls adds even more excitement and depth to your JAV production!

 
 

 
 Character Introductions

【Nodoka Himeyama】

The heroine of this work.

She has a boyfriend of the same age who is also a childhood friend.

While struggling with a large debt incurred for a certain reason,

she meets Kosuke.

【Maiko Akizuki】

A former colleague from the company where Kosuke used to work.

She secretly has feelings for Kosuke.

She reunites with him by chance

and begins to give him advice on JAV production.

【Rem】

An older woman who runs a suspicious item shop in town.

Her age is unknown.

She supplies Kosuke and the others with various equipment

and sells items that could be useful for filming.

She apparently has a husband and earns a living all by herself.

【Yuna】

Nodoka's best friend, a "gyaru" girl.

She is worried about Nodoka's work,

but feels frustrated because

Nodoka herself won't talk about it.

【Kosuke Yasuda】

The protagonist of this work. A scumbag who loves booze, women, and gambling.

After being fired from a JAV production company, he spent his days gambling,

but upon finding Nodoka, he saw a money-making opportunity and decided to start his own JAV company.

 
 【Soya Nakayama】

Nodoka's boyfriend and childhood friend.

Although he has known Nodoka well since they were young,

she has not told him about her debt.

Game Volume

  • 17 Stages

  • 4 Heroines

  • 34 Situations

  • 18 Event Scenes

  • Over 800 Animations

  • Over 20 Minutes of Movies

  • Over 35 CGs

  • 5 Additional Costumes

  • Total Text: Over 250,000 characters

  • Total Voice Recording Time: Over 26 hours

  • 4 Minigames

  • Playtime: 10-20 hours

  • Over 110 Items

  • Supported Languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish, Korean

data.short_description: AV production simulation game you can freely film, edit, and sell your creations! Work with charming heroines to produce top-tier masterpieces, boost your reputation, and grow your sales. Striving to pay off your debts, take on the fiery challenge of reaching the top of the industry as a director!
data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 8
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 7th gen
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
